name: Invesco Galaxy Solana ETF
summary: PART I Overview Invesco Galaxy Solana ETF (the Trust) is a Delaware statutory trust formed on June 12, 2025, pursuant to the Delaware Statutory Trust Act (DSTA). The Trust continuously issues common shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interest in and ownership of the Trust (Shares). The Trust operates pursuant to its Amended and Restated Declaration of Trust and Trust Agreement, dated as of November 28, 2025 (the Trust Agreement).
